---
title: Factor Graph Accelerator for LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (Invited Paper)
author:
- Yuhui Hao
- Bo Yu
- Qiang Liu
- Shaoshan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3508352.3561112
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/FGLIO
journ: ICCAD
year: 2022
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 59
---
